title: <div>:Based on the pull request at https://github.com/ivi374forivi/petasum-super
content:
:Based on the pull request at https://github.com/ivi374forivi/petasum-super-petasum/pull/3, here's the functionality of the mentioned repositories:

## PR Overview
This pull request incorporates organizational commandments from three exemplar open-source projects to guide issue tracking and community practices.

## Mentioned Repositories and Their Functionality

### 1. **Semgrep** (4444JPP/semgrep)
Contributes **privacy-first, open source, deterministic execution, and performance** principles to the organization's guidelines. Semgrep is a static analysis tool focused on code scanning with an emphasis on reliability and speed.

### 2. **TensorFlow** (4444JPP/tensorflow)
Provides principles around **quality over quantity, collaboration, transparency, and backward compatibility**. TensorFlow is a machine learning framework that emphasizes maintaining stable APIs and collaborative development practices.

### 3. **Schema.org** (4444JPP/schemaorg)
Establishes standards for **interoperability, clarity, inclusivity, and stability**. Schema.org focuses on structured data standards for the web, prioritizing clear documentation and broad adoption.
